programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep103: Mysterious Tentacles
programme.desc: Mysterious Tentacles follows Dr. Jennifer Mather as she leads a team of renowned scientists to the beautiful Caribbean island of Bonaire. Their mission is to prove a controversial theory: reef squid speak to each other with a complex language they paint on their skin.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep108: Manatees and Dugongs In Danger
programme.desc: Each year, hundreds of critically endangered manatees are killed in U.S. waters by boats, disease and cold weather. 2006 was the worst year on record for manatee deaths – 416 animals perished. With only a few thousand remaining in the wild, mostly in heavily developed Florida wetlands, the clock is ticking in efforts to save this amazing mammal from extinction.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep305: US Virgin Islands by Paddleboard
programme.desc: With sheltered turquoise waters, the U.S. Virgin Islands is an ideal location to explore by stand-up paddleboard. In this Facing Waves episode, we compete in USVI's Paddle-The-Park SUP race, we snorkel fish-filled waters, and find out why SUP yoga has become so popular.

programme.title: Blue World Ep402: Bull Sharks in Mexico + NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab
programme.desc: Blue World travels to Mexico for an up-close encounter with Bull sharks and then visits NASA's Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston where astronauts train underwater for space walking.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep103: Mysterious Tentacles
programme.desc: Mysterious Tentacles follows Dr. Jennifer Mather as she leads a team of renowned scientists to the beautiful Caribbean island of Bonaire. Their mission is to prove a controversial theory: reef squid speak to each other with a complex language they paint on their skin.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Twe12ve
programme.desc: A winter of extremes sets the stage for Twe12ve. Absinthe Films follows twelve riders chasing record snow across legendary ranges, pushing boundaries and redefining what’s possible in another wintry shred classic.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Escramble
programme.desc: In a time beyond and close to now... a vision was revealed. A vision of the very first dream of life. The dream of life before there was life. The dream that vapor dreams of becoming solid and falling to meet whatever will catch and hold it. Thus begins "ESCRAMBLE". Featuring Bjorn Leines, Terje Haakonsen, Mark Landvik, Wille Yli-Louma, Shaun White, Seth Huot, Gigi Rüf, Erik Leines, Bryan Iguchi, Chris Demolski and Jamie Lynn.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: 9191
programme.desc: 9191 is a sideways introspective into the bewildering snow-covered dreamscape of international time traveler and mystic of the shred - Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 6
programme.desc: For its sixth season, the ultra-high performance one design catamarans, once again visited five top venues across the world. Each location selected particularly for its ideal weather conditions - stable winds and flat waters - perfect for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at speeds of over 30 knots. Earlier in 2019, intensive discussions and decisions took place within the teams with many deciding to focus their efforts for the upcoming season, on the GC32 Racing Tour. This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. Amongst them, some of the most well-known professional sailors in the world.

programme.title: Panerai Classic Yachts Challenge - 2018
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Journey To Giglio
programme.desc: On January of 2012 the Italian cruise ship Costa Concordia sank in shallow waters after striking an underwater rock off Isola del Giglio. Many things remained unclear about this tragedy, so Andi van Zyl is set to discover the truth regarding this incident.Journey to Giglio is an investigative piece on the infamous Costa Concordia tragedy. Andi van Zyl is on the Italian island of Giglio for an exclusive exposé on the shipwreck that shocked the world. She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.

programme.title: Eurosaf Championship Tavira
programme.desc: The EUROSAF (European Sailing Federation) Championship will take place in the waters off the Portuguese town of Tavira. The 19 sailing champions of Europe will be crowned in this gathering that has over 150 sailors and more than 100 boats and boards compete against triumph. 14 European countries have sent their best sailors to compete in eight different disciplines, including single-handed and double-handed dinghies, plus sailboards and high performance dinghy. They will compete over the 5-day competition to choose the youth champion of Europe in each of these disciplines. Follow the competition of the future talent of the sailing world as they sail across the waters of Tavira, on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Chain of Souls
programme.desc: When a naive aspiring actress from Podunk, Texas disappears in Los Angeles, her protective sister comes looking for her. The clues lead her to a diabolical cult masquerading as a theater group and the fight of her life.

programme.title: Infliction
programme.desc: In 2011, two brothers documented their murder spree in North Carolina. This is the actual assembled footage.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf
programme.desc: In this celebration of childhood, a 10-year-old girl struggles to find her place in a 'boys' world.

programme.title: Rocket Perelman
programme.desc: In a quest for self-directed living, ten artists near Berlin join forces to start the artist's colony 'Rakete Perelman'. But, they need money.

programme.title: Brother
programme.desc: Lukasz (24) works for a big name in the industry. But after the death of his mother, his little brother Kamil (13) suddenly appears on his doorstep.

programme.title: Who Am I Happy
programme.desc: When Mika enters 15-year-old Alicia life, she is confused by their appearance.

programme.title: Beat Beat Heart
programme.desc: A playful romanticist has been waiting for the love of her life to return – when suddenly her newly separated mother moves in.

programme.title: Fair Traders
programme.desc: Three players in the free market economy accept responsibility for society and future generations: They do business sustainably.

programme.title: All About Rita
programme.desc: The love and life suffering of young people between Cologne and Berlin, with Woody Allenesque lightness.

programme.title: Ghetto
programme.desc: A touching documentary about the everyday life of Zurich's forgotten youth.

programme.title: Fraulein
programme.desc: An intimate look at three headstrong women who come from different parts of a country that no longer exists.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alice and the Vampire Queen
programme.desc: Alice Oldman is an ex-con struggling to overcome the scars from her past. Then one night a dark stranger gives her an offer she cannot refuse. Make one special dish for his boss, the Vampire Queen.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: A Dream Called Death
programme.desc: An introvert and Schizophrenic young man finds the "Perfect Cure" to his mental illness in the form of a damsel whom he considers to be the "Woman of his dream," but his dream somewhat turns out to be a nightmare for him and everyone around him!

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Making Out
programme.desc: A screenwriter and self-proclaimed hopeless romantic meets a beautiful actress and they decide to act out their ideal love scenarios. When real feelings start to jump off the page and become real will he tell her how he feels? They're in love, probably.

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo
programme.desc: The water is cool and the girls are hot, what more could you want? Jump in and go for a swim, then wash up for a fun night out because the beach has nothing but sand and babes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Far UV creates autonomous disinfection devices that can assist in containing the inevitable emergence of infectious diseases that can be spread by pathogens on surfaces or through the air. It is under contract with NASA to prevent foodborne illness in space flight and works with the US Army.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Charlie, Bianca and Anna are on their way to see Dalia, who has fallen off the grid since becoming a mum. While Dalia tries to wrangle herself, a sick child and a grumpy husband.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: FORTE s a female-founded and led technology company. Launched by Lauren Foundos in 2015, FORTE’s white label streaming platform helps boutique fitness studios, big box gyms and health clubs create premium live and on-demand fitness experiences for members.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Dalia tries to connect with her child-free mates, Charlie, Anna and Bianca - while giving them a realistic taste of suburban living.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones,

programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the founders of Architects and Engineers for 911 Truth and Firefighters for 911

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Margik is creating the future where smart OrganicLEDs enhance our quality of life

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 8 - Stockholm
programme.desc: The Swedish capital of Stockholm is the host of the eighth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2022: the international circuit that challenges top-riders from around the world in individual show jumping. As one of the hardest jump offs this season, who will make it to the top in Sweden? Watch the highlights of the Longines Global Champions Tour Stockholm Grand Prix!

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 8 - Stockholm
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Deauville International Polo Club vs Empire Club of Coachella Valley
programme.desc: Deauville International Polo Club is going against Empire Club of Coachella Valley in this first stage of the 2021 Polo Rider Cup at the Polo Club of Chantilly. Both teams have been preparing hard for this moment and are ready to make the most points to advance to the next stage. Who will win?

programme.title: Black Bears Women´s Tournament - Final
programme.desc: Park Place and Tarantula will fight in the final of the awaited Black Bears Women's Tournament. Eight women's teams up to 18-goals have fought for the title, however, after several days of competition, only two remain in one of the most exciting finals in this tournament.Don't miss out on the 2020 final of the Black Bears Women's Tournament!

programme.title: Jumping International Bordeaux - Grand Prix Land Rover
programme.desc: The CSI5*W Grand Prix Land Rover Trophée is one of the most awaited competitions in the Jumping International de Bordeaux. With a height of 1.60m, it is one of the toughest tests in the French event. Riders will have to show their perseverance, effort and speed in the obstacle course in order to get a spot in the podium.Relieve the best moments of the Grand Prix Land Rover 2019 edition.

programme.title: Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup - Falsterbo
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Dressage Season Review - Episode 1
programme.desc: The best action in the dressage world is ready for the 2016/2017 edition. Riders prepare themselves for this arduous challenge that give us some of the most magical moments in equestrian sports. Be part of the excitement that moves across Europe, the Americas and the Pacific in the 2016/2017 Dressage World Cup Season.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: The Steel Claw
programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: There is panic throughout the nation as the dead suddenly come back to life.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A group of medical students undertake some silly and frightening endeavors in order to pledge a fraternity

programme.title: Quicksand
programme.desc: After borrowing $20 from his employer's cash register, an auto mechanic is plunged into a series of increasingly disastrous circumstances which rapidly spiral out of his control

programme.title: Suddenly
programme.desc: In the city of Suddenly, three gangsters trap the Benson family in their own house, on the top of a hill nearby the railroad station, with the intention of killing the president of the USA

programme.title: The Flying Deuces
programme.desc: Ollie has fallen in love with the innkeeper's daughter in Paris. The only problem - she's very much in love with her husband. To forget her he joins the Foreign Legion with Stan

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don’t have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don’t let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what’s in your way.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Alleluia
programme.desc: The official live video for “Alleluia” by Elevation Worship with Chris Brown and Chandler Moore.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone
programme.desc: Pastor Steven shares a simple truth that can help you endure life’s hardest trials. True security isn't the absence of trouble; it’s the presence of a Savior who promises you’ll never walk through it alone.

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Aute Retrato
programme.desc: Recopilación de los mejores momentos de Luis Eduardo Aute en sus 50 años de carrera musical y artística. Un recorrido por sus distintas facetas creativas y sus bandas sonoras. Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.title: Al Acecho del Leopardo AKA Madrid- México
programme.desc: Durante un viaje por la selva mexicana, tres amigos, Román, Patricia y Lorena son testigos de una matanza de campesinos indígenas. Román graba en vídeo la masacre. El Suavecito, el jefe de los asesinos, se da cuenta y mata a Román y a Patricia. Aprovechando la confusión del tiroteo, Lorena logra escapar con la cámara y el vídeo. En su huida se encuentra con un grupo de enanitos toreros que la llevan hasta la ciudad de México. El Suavecito, que no quiere dejar testigos, la persigue implacablemente hasta una enorme plaza de toros, donde en una danza de la muerte, se escenificará la batalla entre el bien y el mal.

programme.title: Aquel Septiembre
programme.desc: En "Septiembre" la vida de Antonio se ve sacudida con el regreso de Carolina, su mejor amigo a quien no ve desde hace 6 años. Esta vez sus planes cambian, el amor comienza a juega con su corazón mientras Julián le hace descubrir los celos que nunca pensó encontraría. Carolina encuentra en Antonio a su mejor confidente y desahogo, sin sabiendo el daño que le hace al decirle todo lo que siente por Julián y hablando con él sobre su confusión por enamorarse de un amigo. Y es que pobre Antonio está enamorado de Carolina, su mejor amiga.

Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.title: Al Acecho del Leopardo AKA Madrid- México
programme.desc: Durante un viaje por la selva mexicana, tres amigos, Román, Patricia y Lorena son testigos de una matanza de campesinos indígenas. Román graba en vídeo la masacre. El Suavecito, el jefe de los asesinos, se da cuenta y mata a Román y a Patricia. Aprovechando la confusión del tiroteo, Lorena logra escapar con la cámara y el vídeo. En su huida se encuentra con un grupo de enanitos toreros que la llevan hasta la ciudad de México. El Suavecito, que no quiere dejar testigos, la persigue implacablemente hasta una enorme plaza de toros, donde en una danza de la muerte, se escenificará la batalla entre el bien y el mal.

programme.title: Aquel Septiembre
programme.desc: En "Septiembre" la vida de Antonio se ve sacudida con el regreso de Carolina, su mejor amigo a quien no ve desde hace 6 años. Esta vez sus planes cambian, el amor comienza a juega con su corazón mientras Julián le hace descubrir los celos que nunca pensó encontraría. Carolina encuentra en Antonio a su mejor confidente y desahogo, sin sabiendo el daño que le hace al decirle todo lo que siente por Julián y hablando con él sobre su confusión por enamorarse de un amigo. Y es que pobre Antonio está enamorado de Carolina, su mejor amiga.

programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
